diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: exports Hono class and types Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, TypedResponse, Context, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions
+- Internal names noticed: Hono (re-exported), types from './types'
+- Imports or neighbors: './hono' for Hono class
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point that re-exports the Hono class and core type definitions from submodules
+- Copy-safe detail: Module comment lines 1-15 with @module documentation
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: types Bindings, Variables, BlankEnv, Env, Next, Input, BlankSchema, BlankInput, RouterRoute, HandlerResponse, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface
+- Internal names noticed: Composed type aliases like IntersectNonAnyTypes, ToSchema, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, ExtractInput, JSONValue, RemoveBlankRecord, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, StatusCode, ResponseHeader, CustomHeader
+- Imports or neighbors: './context', './hono-base', './utils/headers', './utils/types', './router'
+- Plain-English summary: Core type definitions for handlers, routes, schema, input validation, and all interface types
+- Copy-safe detail: BlankEnv and BlankSchema bare objects {} lines 30, 49
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: exports Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: Hono class extends HonoBase, uses SmartRouter by default with fallback to RegExpRouter and TrieRouter
+- Imports or neighbors: './hono-base' for HonoBase, './router/reg-exp-router', './router/smart-router', './router/trie-router', './types' for BlankEnv/BlankSchema/Env/Schema
+- Plain-English summary: Main Hono class that extends HonoBase with router initialization logic
+- Copy-safe detail: class Hono declaration with generic parameters (lines 17-19)
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: exports Hono as public alias HonoBase via 'export { Hono as HonoBase }' at module end, exposes typed properties get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use
+- Internal names noticed: compose import, Context import, private _basePath string field, secret #path string field, public routes array, notFoundHandler instance, errorHandler instance, methods get/post/put/delete/on/use, clone method, route method, basePath method, onError method, notFound method, mount method, #dispatch private method, fetch method, request method, fire deprecated method
+- Imports or neighbors: './compose', './context', './router', './types', './utils/constants', './utils/url'
+- Plain-English summary: Base Hono class with route registration, middleware support, routing, error handling, request dispatching, and adapter mount functionality
+- Copy-safe detail: notFoundHandler and errorHandler default functions (lines 31-41)
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: exports Context class, types ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, Renderer, PropsForRenderer, Layout, Get interface, Set interface, NewResponse interface, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, JSONRespondReturn, ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, StatusCode, TEXT_PLAIN constant
+- Internal names noticed: private #rawRequest, #req, #var, #status, #executionCtx, #res, #layout, #renderer, #notFoundHandler, #preparedHeaders, #matchResult, #path, helper interfaces Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond, setDefaultContentType function, createResponseInstance function, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback
+- Imports or neighbors: './request' for HonoRequest, './router' for Result, './types', './utils/headers', './utils/html', './utils/mime', './utils/types'
+- Plain-English summary: Request context class managing request lifecycle, variables, headers, status, responses, layouts, and rendering
+- Copy-safe detail: TEXT_PLAIN = 'text/plain; charset=UTF-8' constant (line 279)
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: exports HonoRequest class, cloneRawRequest constant function, GET_MATCH_RESULT unique symbol
+- Internal names noticed: private #validatedData map, private #matchResult, public bodyCache map, routeIndex number, Body type, BodyCache type, BodyCache methods (json/text/arrayBuffer/blob/formData), private methods #getDecodedParam, #getAllDecodedParams, #getParamValue, #cachedBody
+- Imports or neighbors: './http-exception' for HTTPException, './request/constants' for GET_MATCH_RESULT, './router' for Result, './types', './utils/body', './utils/headers', './utils/url'
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper class providing param/query/header parsing, body access methods, and route matching data
+- Copy-safe detail: HTTPException usage in cloneRawRequest for body consumption errors (lines 455-466)
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: exports GET_MATCH_RESULT unique symbol
+- Internal names noticed: only GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol export
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Single export file for the GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol used in request type checking
+- Copy-safe detail: export of GET_MATCH_RESULT: unique symbol (line 1)
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: exports parseBody function, ParseBody interface, BodyData type, ParseBodyOptions type, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValue, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue types
+- Internal names noticed: private async parseFormData function, private convertFormDataToBodyData function, private handleParsingAllValues function, private handleParsingNestedValues function, parseBody, all/dot ParseBodyOptions default values (false/false), nullBodyResponses for fetchRP
+- Imports or neighbors: '../request' for HonoRequest
+- Plain-English summary: Form data and body parsing utils with multipart/urlencoded support, all/dot options, and nested object handling
+- Copy-safe detail: parseBody async function (returns early for non-form-data content types) (lines 94-111)
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: exports compose function
+- Internal names noticed: private dispatch nested function, index variable, res variable (context.res), isError boolean flag, handler function from middleware, context.error, context.finalized
+- Imports or neighbors: './context' for Context type, './types' for Env/Errorhandler/Next/NotFoundHandler
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition utility following koa-compose pattern, handles dispatch, error handling, and not-found fallbacks
+- Copy-safe detail: None - entire file is the compose function
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: exports HTTPException class, res/getResponse on HTTPException
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions type, HTTPException class extending Error, res property (Response?), status ContentfulStatusCode property, getResponse method, constructor with status and options
+- Imports or neighbors: './utils/http-status' for ContentfulStatusCode
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP error exception class for authentication failures and other fatal errors, includes optional response object
+- Copy-safe detail: constructor default status = 500 (line 56), getResponse method returning Response (lines 65-77)
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: exports hc function, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: re-exports from './client' and './utils', hc from './client', parseResponse/DetailedError from './utils'
+- Imports or neighbors: './client/client', './client/utils'
+- Plain-English summary: Hono HTTP client exports - hc for client creation, parseResponse/utils for type inference
+- Copy-safe detail: Module comment lines 1-4
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: exports hc function, private ClientRequestImpl class
+- Internal names noticed: ClientRequestImpl class with private url/method/buildSearchParams/queryParams/pathParams/rBody/cType, client-side proxy creation using createProxy function, ClientRequestImpl.fetch method with query/header/body processing, hc function generating proxy
+- Imports or neighbors: '../hono' for Hono, '../types' for ValidationTargets, '../utils/cookie' for serialize, './types', './utils'
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client implementation building URL, handling query params, headers, form/json bodies, proxy-based API, returns fetch result
+- Copy-safe detail: ClientRequestImpl class constructor and fetch implementation (lines 33-130)
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: exports BuildSearchParamsFn type, ClientRequestOptions type, ClientRequest type, ClientResponse interface, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptionsType type, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode types
+- Internal names noticed: MethodNameAll type, StandardMethods type, ExpandAllMethod type, HonoRequest alias, ClientRequestImpl usage via proxy, many utility types (ToObject, ObjectType, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, PickRoute, PickSchema, PathToChain, BuildPath, BuildPathname, BuildTypedURL, HonoURL, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, IsEmptyObject, TypedURL, Response type alias), InferResponseType/InferEndpointType recursive types
+- Imports or neighbors: '../hono', '../hono-base', '../router' for METHODS/METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, '../types', '../utils/http-status'
+- Plain-English summary: Client runtime types for path/method parameterization, schema inference, URL construction with protocol/host/port/path/query
+- Copy-safe detail: ClientResponse interface with body/ok/redirect/clone/bytes/json/text/blob methods (lines 128-154)
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: exports mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse, DetailedError (re-export from fetch-result-please)
+- Internal names noticed: mergePath joining base+path, replaceUrlParam substituting :param placeholders, buildSearchParams converting record to URLSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol http/wsws conversion, removeIndexString removing /index path segments, deepMerge with isObject helper, parseResponse using fetchRP from './client/fetch-result-please'
+- Imports or neighbors: './client/fetch-result-please' for fetchRP/DetailedError
+- Plain-English summary: Client utility functions for URL building/parameterization, query serialization, protocol replacement, response parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: mergePath with base.replace(/\/+$/, '') and path.replace(/^\/+/, '') normalization (lines 11-16)
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: exports fetchRP function, DetailedError class
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses Set for status codes 101,204,205,304, detectResponseType function with jsonRegex, fetchRP returning Response._data or body, DetailedError extending Error with detail/code/log/statusCode properties
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English statement: Minimal fetch-response parser detecting response-type by header, throwing DetailedError on non-2xx responses
+- Copy-safe detail: nullBodyResponses = new Set([101, 204, 205, 304]) (line 7), DetailedError class with properties (lines 46-75)
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: exports fire, handle
+- Internal names noticed: fire function with addEventListener bind, handle exported from './handler', type aliases for E/S/BasePath from Hono
+- Imports or neighbors: '../../hono' for Hono, '../../types' for Env/Schema, './handler' for handle
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter exposing fire() wrapper around handle(app) for fetch event listener registration
+- Copy-safe detail: fire function body (lines 28-34)
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: exports handle function, HandleOptions type
+- Internal names noticed: handle function wrapping app.fetch with await, FetchEvent type import, handler type alias (evt => void callback), opts.fetch fallback on 404
+- Imports or neighbors: '../../hono' for Hono, '../../types' for Env/Schema, './types' for FetchEvent
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker handler wrapping Hono app's .fetch with async await and passing FetchEvent to it
+- Copy-safe detail: handle function returning (async () => {...})() (lines 18-36)
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: exports FetchEvent interface
+- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent interface, FetchEvent extending ExtendableEvent with clientId/handled/preloadResponse/request/resultingClientId/respondWith
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: FetchEvent interface extending ExtendableEvent with Service Worker fields
+- Copy-safe detail: FetchEvent interface (lines 6-13)
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client
